parameters.name: permanent
parameters.description: If true, permanently delete the thread instead of moving to trash.

delete.description: Moves the thread to trash by adding a trash label to all messages. If the thread is already in trash, it will be permanently deleted. Use `permanent=true` to force permanent deletion.

parameters.name: permanent
parameters.description: If true, permanently delete the thread instead of moving to trash.

delete.description: Moves the thread to trash by adding a trash label to all messages. If the thread is already in trash, it will be permanently deleted. Use `permanent=true` to force permanent deletion.

parameters.name: permanent
parameters.description: If true, permanently delete the thread instead of moving to trash.

delete.description: Moves the thread to trash by adding a trash label to all messages. If the thread is already in trash, it will be permanently deleted. Use `permanent=true` to force permanent deletion.

reply_to.description: Reply-to addresses. In format `username@domain.com` or `Display Name <username@domain.com>`.

status.description: The verification status of the domain.
